# Seisly API Documentation

**Auto-generated Rust API documentation for all Seisly crates.**

## Crates (18 total)

### Core
- [seisly_core](./seisly_core/index.html) - Domain models and types
- [seisly_crs](./seisly_crs/index.html) - Coordinate reference systems
- [seisly_storage](./seisly_storage/index.html) - SQLite and blob storage

### I/O
- [seisly_io](./seisly_io/index.html) - SEG-Y, LAS, CSV readers/writers
- [seisly_export](./seisly_export/index.html) - JSON, XYZ exporters

### Compute
- [seisly_compute](./seisly_compute/index.html) - Seismic algorithms
- [seisly_attributes](./seisly_attributes/index.html) - Seismic attributes
- [seisly_attributes_gpu](./seisly_attributes_gpu/index.html) - GPU-accelerated attributes

### ML & AI
- [seisly_ml](./seisly_ml/index.html) - Machine learning (CNN, auto-tracking)
- [seisly_ml_deep](./seisly_ml_deep/index.html) - Deep learning (U-Net)

### Advanced
- [seisly_qi](./seisly_qi/index.html) - Quantitative Interpretation (AVO, FWI)
- [seisly_4d](./seisly_4d/index.html) - 4D time-lapse monitoring
- [seisly_fwi](./seisly_fwi/index.html) - Full Waveform Inversion
- [seisly_tracking](./seisly_tracking/index.html) - Auto-tracking
- [seisly_production](./seisly_production/index.html) - Well planning, CCUS

### App & CLI
- [seisly_app](./seisly_app/index.html) - Desktop GUI (egui)
- [seisly_cli](./seisly_cli/index.html) - Command-line interface

### Infrastructure
- [seisly_render](./seisly_render/index.html) - GPU rendering (wgpu)
- [seisly_plugin](./seisly_plugin/index.html) - Plugin system

---

**Generated:** 2026-03-30
